parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const s = $('20_Evaluate_Budget').item.json; const icon = s.severity === 'exceeded' ? '🚨' : '⚠️'; const head = s.severity === 'exceeded' ? 'AI BUDGET EXCEEDED' : 'AI budget warning'; const lines = [icon + ' ' + head + '', 'Daily: $' + s.daily_cost_usd + ' / $' + s.daily_limit_usd + ' (' + s.daily_pct + '%)' + (s.daily_exceeded ? ' ❌' : ''), 'Monthly: $' + s.monthly_cost_usd + ' / $' + s.monthly_limit_usd + ' (' + s.monthly_pct + '%)' + (s.monthly_exceeded ? ' ❌' : ''), 'Calls 24h: ' + s.daily_call_count + ' | MTD: ' + s.monthly_call_count]; return JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TG_GROUP_CHAT_ID, parse_mode: 'HTML', text: lines.join('\n') }); })() }}
